rules_text: Broken rules: Tic-Tac-Toe is played on a 3x3 grid. Two players take turns placing X and O. A player may place a mark on any square, including one that is already occupied. The first player to get three in a row wins. If the board is full and nobody wins, the game ends in a draw.

rules_text: Broken rules: Tic-Tac-Toe is played on a 4x4 grid. Two players alternate turns placing X and O in empty squares. A player wins by making three in a row horizontally, vertically, or diagonally. If the board fills without a winner, the game ends in a draw.
gold_errors: board size is incorrectly described as 4x4 instead of 3x3

rules_text: Tic-Tac-Toe is played on a 3x3 grid. Two players take turns placing X and O in empty squares. A player wins by forming three in a row horizontally, vertically, or diagonally. If the board is full and no player wins, the game ends in a draw.
